title: Slovakian Chicken Tacos
description: A unique twist on traditional Mexican tacos by incorporating Slovakian flavors and using chicken as the main protein.

ingredients.name: shredded cheese
ingredients.notes: cheddar or Monterey Jack work well

instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt, pepper, and Slovakian paprika.
Bake the chicken in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the chicken is baking, warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Once the chicken is done, let it rest for a few minutes before slicing it into thin strips.
Assemble the tacos by placing a few slices of chicken onto a tortilla, followed by a sprinkle of shredded cheese, a few slices of radish, and a sprinkle of cilantro.
Drizzle the gooey molasses over the top of the tacos and serve with a lime wedge on the side.
